_metadata.name: Compass Business Context Extraction Dataset
_metadata.description: Unified evaluation dataset for LLM business context extraction

priorities.low_latency: Fast response time, real-time, instant, quick, sub-second
priorities.cost_saving: Budget, cheap, cost-effective, minimize cost, affordable
priorities.high_throughput: Batch processing, high volume, maximum throughput, scale
priorities.high_quality: Accuracy is key, quality matters, precision, no hallucinations

We are a large enterprise looking to deploy a conversational AI assistant that will serve our customer support department. We expect around 500 concurrent users during peak hours, and we need the system to respond within 200ms for a good user experience. The assistant should handle general inquiries, product questions, and basic troubleshooting.

Our engineering team of 300 developers needs a code completion tool integrated into their IDEs. They work primarily with Python, JavaScript, and Go. Speed is critical as developers expect instant suggestions while typing. We have budget for H100 GPUs if needed.

Looking for a document summarization solution for our research department. About 200 analysts need to process lengthy reports and papers daily. The summaries don't need to be instant - a few seconds delay is acceptable. We want to minimize infrastructure costs.

We need a RAG-based system for our legal team of 100 attorneys. They need to query a large corpus of legal documents, contracts, and case law. Accuracy is paramount - we cannot afford hallucinations. Response time should be under 2 seconds. We have A100 GPUs available.

Our global marketing team spanning 400 people across 20 countries needs a content generation tool. They create social media posts, email campaigns, and blog articles. The tool should support multiple languages and maintain brand voice consistency. Budget is flexible but we want good ROI.

We're building an internal translation service for our multinational corporation. Around 1500 employees need to translate documents between English, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, and Japanese. High throughput is important as we process thousands of documents daily. Running on L4 GPUs.

Need to deploy a detailed code generation service for our platform team of 150 engineers. Unlike simple autocomplete, they need full function implementations with documentation and tests. Quality matters more than speed. Deploying on our H200 cluster.

Our financial analysis team of 80 professionals needs a system to process and summarize extremely long documents - quarterly reports, SEC filings, research papers up to 50+ pages. They can wait several seconds for results. Cost efficiency is important for our startup.

Building a customer-facing chatbot for our e-commerce platform expecting 2000 concurrent users during sales events. The bot needs to answer product questions, track orders, and handle returns. Sub-second response is crucial. We've allocated H100 GPU budget.

Our law firm needs a comprehensive legal document analysis system. 60 paralegals will use it to review contracts, identify clauses, and compare agreements. The system must handle multi-document analysis and long contexts. Accuracy over speed. A100 GPUs provisioned.

We want to create an AI writing assistant for our newsroom of 120 journalists. They need help with article drafts, headline suggestions, and fact-checking summaries. The tool should be fast enough for deadline-driven work but accuracy is more important than raw speed.

Setting up a knowledge base Q&A system for our IT helpdesk supporting 800 internal employees. They need to query our documentation, runbooks, and past ticket resolutions. Fast responses are critical - under 1 second preferred. Budget allows for A100 deployment.

Our translation agency needs to handle bulk translation jobs. We process documents for about 600 clients. The system should optimize for throughput - we need to process maximum documents per hour. Running on T4 GPUs to keep costs down.

Deploying an intelligent coding assistant for our distributed team of 450 software engineers. They need context-aware code completion that understands their codebase. Real-time suggestions are must-have. We have H100 infrastructure ready.

Creating a document intelligence platform for our consulting firm. 250 consultants need to analyze client documents, create summaries, and extract insights. Mix of short and long documents. Balanced approach between speed and cost needed.

Our healthcare organization needs a medical document summarization tool for 150 healthcare professionals. They process patient records, research papers, and clinical guidelines. Accuracy is critical - this is healthcare. Long documents up to 100 pages.

Building an AI assistant for our sales team of 350 representatives. They need help with email drafting, proposal writing, and customer communication. Fast turnaround is important during customer calls. L4 GPUs available in our cloud account.

We run an academic research platform serving 500 researchers and students. They need to query and analyze scientific papers, extract citations, and generate literature reviews. Handle complex multi-document queries. A10G GPU cluster available.

Deploying a multilingual customer support chatbot for our SaaS product. Expected 1000 users across US, Europe, and Asia. Need to support English, German, French, Spanish, Japanese. Low latency critical for chat experience. H200 budget approved.

Our DevOps team of 180 engineers needs a code assistant that can help with infrastructure code, scripts, and configuration files. They work with Terraform, Kubernetes YAML, Python scripts, and shell. Integration speed matters for their workflow. A100 GPUs provisioned.

Chatbot for 500 users with low latency on H100 GPUs. We are a growing startup focused on customer experience. Our team has been exploring various AI solutions for the past year. We've evaluated multiple vendors and platforms. The customer service team handles thousands of inquiries daily. We need a solution that scales with our growth.

We are a growing startup focused on customer experience. Our team has been exploring various AI solutions for the past year. We've evaluated multiple vendors. What we need is a chatbot for 500 users with low latency on H100 GPUs. The customer service team handles thousands of inquiries. We need a solution that scales with our growth and integrates well.

We are a growing startup focused on customer experience. Our team has been exploring various AI solutions for the past year. We've evaluated multiple vendors and platforms. The customer service team handles thousands of inquiries daily. We need a solution that scales with our growth and integrates well with our existing systems. So basically we need a chatbot for 500 users with low latency on H100 GPUs.

We need a chatbot solution. Our company has been growing rapidly over the past few years with lots of changes. We have about 500 users who will use this. The infrastructure team has been upgrading our systems. Latency is very important to us - it needs to be low. We've been evaluating different cloud providers. We'd prefer to run this on H100 GPUs if possible.

Our company was founded in 2015 and has grown significantly since then. We started with just 5 employees and now have over 200. The technology landscape has changed dramatically over the years. We've moved from on-premise to cloud. Our customers come from various industries including healthcare, finance, and retail. The digital transformation initiative started in 2020. We evaluated multiple AI vendors including OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google. Our IT infrastructure includes AWS, some GCP, and Azure for specific workloads. The security team has strict requirements. Compliance is important given our healthcare clients. After months of evaluation, what we actually need is a translation system for our 1000 employees. Cost efficiency is our main priority since budget is limited. We'd like to use A100 GPUs. The legal team has reviewed several contracts. HR is also involved in the decision.
We want to use H100 GPUs. Low latency is critical for us. We expect around 500 users. We need a chatbot for customer service.

Last year we deployed a translation system for 2000 users but now we need something different. We used to care about cost but now latency is key. Previously we used A100s but this time we want a code completion tool for just 50 developers on L4 GPUs.

Code completion for 300 developers on A100 GPUs with cost efficiency priority. Our company has been in business for 15 years. We have offices in 5 countries. The IT department handles all technology decisions. We've used various tools over the years. The budget committee meets quarterly to review expenses.

We are evaluating multiple vendors for our AI needs. The procurement process takes about 3 months. Legal review is required for all contracts. Security assessment is mandatory. After all evaluations, we decided we need a translation service for 800 users with high throughput on L4 GPUs.

We need a summarization tool. The company has grown 50% this year. About 400 analysts will use it. We've upgraded our infrastructure recently. Low latency is critical for our workflow. The H100 cluster is ready for deployment.
H200 GPUs are what we have available. Cost saving is our main concern. 150 legal professionals will use it. We need legal document analysis.

Previously we used a chatbot for 1000 users on A100. But now we're switching to content generation for 250 marketers. We no longer need low latency, instead we want high throughput. The new system will run on T4 GPUs.

Our organization was established in 1998 as a small consulting firm. Over the decades, we've expanded into multiple verticals including healthcare, finance, and technology. We have partnerships with major cloud providers including AWS, Azure, and GCP. Our technology stack includes modern frameworks and languages. The digital transformation initiative started in 2019. We've deployed various AI solutions over the years. Our current focus is on automating document workflows. Specifically, we need a RAG system for 600 knowledge workers with balanced performance on A10G GPUs. The implementation timeline is Q2 2024.

Hey, so we've been thinking about this for a while now. You know how developers always complain about slow tools? Well, we have like 180 of them and they really need something fast. We were thinking code generation would help. Oh, and we have some H100s we can use.
Translation is what we need. Our global team spans 20 countries. We're looking at 2000 users total. Budget is our main constraint. We'd prefer to use L4 GPUs if possible.
We're looking for a chatbot solution (probably around 750 users) for customer service. Speed matters a lot (low latency is key). We have A100 GPUs available (the 80GB version).
Can you help us set up a long document summarization system? We have about 90 researchers who would use it. We're hoping to keep costs down. We have access to T4 GPUs in our cluster.
Requirements: - Document analysis/RAG capability - Support for 350 users - Need high throughput for batch processing - Deploy on A100 infrastructure

Hi team, Following up on our discussion - we need a code completion tool for the engineering team (about 220 developers). Fast response time is essential for IDE integration. We can use the H100 cluster. Thanks!
Looking to deploy an inference endpoint for content generation. Target concurrent users: 180. SLA requires sub-200ms TTFT so low latency config needed. Hardware allocated: 2x H200 SXM.
We don't need a chatbot. What we actually need is a translation service. Not for a small team - we have 1200 users. Latency isn't the priority, throughput is. We're NOT using A100, we have L4 GPUs.
Unlike our previous RAG deployment with 50 users, this new chatbot needs to scale to 900 users. While we used to prioritize cost, now low latency is essential. Moving from T4 to H100 infrastructure.
We need a summarization tool. The documents are typically 50-100 pages. Processing time should be under 5 seconds. We expect 400 users. Budget is $10k monthly. Using A10G GPUs.
Need a RAG solution for Q&A. Est. 500 concurrent users. Prio: low lat. HW: H100 80GB.

Last month, our legal team came to us with a problem. They spend hours reviewing contracts. There are 60 attorneys who need help. They asked for a research analysis tool. We have A100 GPUs we can allocate.

Project requirements summary:
• Use case: Code generation with documentation
• Team size: 120 engineers
• Performance: Not latency sensitive, focus on quality
• Infrastructure: H200 cluster
• Timeline: Q1 2024
• Budget: Approved
If possible, we'd like a chatbot for about 600 users. Ideally with fast response times. We have H100 GPUs available if that helps.

Marketing wants content creation. Sales wants a chatbot. Engineering wants code tools. But IT decided: we're deploying content generation for 300 marketing users. Focus on throughput. Using L4 cluster.
By Q2, we need a translation system operational. Phase 1: 500 users. Phase 2 will expand to 2000. For now, 500 users, cost efficiency priority, T4 GPUs.
Chatbot. 1000 users. Fast. H100.
